description: Lawpowers Ukraine — Codex support for Ukrainian legal drafting and source workflows. Codex plugin ID: law-ua. Claude Code keeps the ua plugin ID.

interface.shortDescription: Ukrainian legal drafting and source workflows
interface.longDescription: Lawpowers Ukraine provides skills and agent prompts for Ukrainian legislation, legal documents, court filings, legal memos, source citation, and military-law workflows for service members and families. Codex plugin ID: law-ua; Claude Code keeps ua.
